# v19.7 Field House coordination pass

- Preserved v19.6 Field House layout and collision zones exactly.
- Improved Field House visual communication: exit arrow/door, coach desk/banner, medical recovery table, dominant central mat, GEAR sign, practice rack, meeting board.
- Made Field House NPCs stationary/non-disruptive so they do not patrol into route-critical lanes.
- Slightly reduced HUD dominance without changing HUD systems.
- Did not change Campus Quad, battles, recruiting, scouting, saves, or menus except required version/cache sync.
